command:
set -euo pipefail
printf 'gh_path='; command -v gh || true
printf 'gh_version='; gh --version | head -n1 || true
gh auth status >/tmp/m066-gh-auth-status.txt 2>&1 || true
if grep -q 'Logged in' /tmp/m066-gh-auth-status.txt; then echo 'gh_auth=logged_in'; else echo 'gh_auth=not_logged_in'; fi
gh api repos/xbmc/kodiai -R xbmc/kodiai --jq '{full_name,permissions}'
gh pr view 134 -R xbmc/kodiai --json number,url,state,headRefName,headRefOid,baseRefName,baseRefOid,comments,reviews --jq '{number,url,state,headRefName,headRefOid,baseRefName,baseRefOid,commentCount:(.comments|length),reviewCount:(.reviews|length)}'

import json, subprocess, sys

cmd=['gh','api','repos/xbmc/kodiai/pulls/134/comments','--jq','map(select((.body//"")|contains("```suggestion"))) | length']
res=subprocess.run(cmd,text=True,stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
checks.append(('suggestion comments absent',res.returncode,res.stdout.strip()))
for name, code, out in checks:
    print(f'{name}: exit={code} value={out}')
if checks[0][2] != '1' or checks[1][2] != '1' or checks[2][2] != '0' or checks[3][2] != '0':
    raise SystemExit(1)
print('github_surface_checks_ok')
